# Copilot Instructions

This repository is a Windows-friendly, local-first CPU-only foundation for a future model lab.

Follow the repo structure and keep changes consistent with the existing data and config contracts.

## Guidance

- Prefer simple Python and plain text configs.
- Preserve schema consistency across docs, configs, and sample files.
- Do not introduce random abstractions.
- Keep workflows local-first and deterministic.
- Keep Windows compatibility in mind.
- Do not add training code in this phase.
- Avoid adding dependencies unless they are clearly required.
- Update documentation when structure changes.
